name: Skewered Tofu in a Soy, Ginger & Orange Marin
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------MARINADE-------------------------
1/2 cup Soy sauce
1/2 cup Orange juice
2 tablespoons Rice vinegar
2 tablespoons Peanut oil
1 tablespoon Dark sesame oil
2 tablespoons Fresh ginger, minced
1/4 teaspoon Hot chili, minced
Combine all the marinade ingredients and whisk together.
Slice tofu in half and marinate at room temperature for 1 hour,
or longer in the refrigerator. Turn frequently.
Wash and trim the mushrooms. Scrub and trim the daikon
and slice into 1-inch pieces. Separate the bok choy leaves,
rinse, and pat them dry. Set aside. Slice the white stems
into 1-inch pieces. Marinate the mushrooms, daikon, and
bok choy stems for 15 minutes.
Slice tofu into 1-inch cubes.
Brush bok choy leaves with marinade. To skewer the leaves,
fold the sides of each leaf inward toward the middle and roll up the leaf,
starting at the top. Thread the leaf packet onto wooden skewers alternately
with the mushrooms, tofu, daikon, and bok choy stem.
On a closed grill, cook the skewers for 12 to 15 minutes,
turning to cook all sides.
